1→"""Tests for PlanFileCollector. 2→ 3→These tests verify that the impl collector correctly gathers implementation folder information 4→including issue references for status display. 5→""" 6→ 7→from pathlib import Path 8→ 9→from erk.core.context import minimal_context 10→from erk.status.collectors.impl import PlanFileCollector 11→from erk_shared.gateway.git.fake import FakeGit 12→from erk_shared.impl_folder import create_impl_folder, save_plan_ref 13→ 14→BRANCH = "feature/test-branch" 15→"""Test branch name used across tests.""" 16→ 17→ 18→def test_plan_collector_no_plan_folder(tmp_path: Path) -> None: 19→ """Test collector returns exists=False when no impl folder exists.""" 20→ git = FakeGit(current_branches={tmp_path: BRANCH}) 21→ ctx = minimal_context(git, tmp_path) 22→ collector = PlanFileCollector() 23→ 24→ result = collector.collect(ctx, tmp_path, tmp_path) 25→ 26→ assert result is not None 27→ assert result.exists is False 28→ assert result.plan_number is None 29→ assert result.plan_url is None 30→

1→"""Implementation folder utilities for erk and erk-kits. 2→ 3→This module provides shared utilities for managing branch-scoped impl directories 4→under .erk/impl-context/<branch>/: 5→- plan.md: Immutable implementation plan 6→- plan-ref.json: Provider-agnostic plan reference 7→ 8→These utilities are used by both erk (for local operations) and erk-kits 9→(for kit CLI commands). 10→""" 11→ 12→from __future__ import annotations 13→ 14→import json 15→import shutil 16→from dataclasses import dataclass 17→from datetime import UTC, datetime 18→from pathlib import Path 19→from typing import Literal 20→ 21→from erk_shared.gateway.github.metadata.core import ( 22→ create_worktree_creation_block, 23→ render_erk_issue_event, 24→) 25→from erk_shared.gateway.github.metadata.schemas import CREATED_BY, LAST_DISPATCHED_RUN_ID 26→from erk_shared.gateway.github.metadata.types import BlockKeys 27→ 28→IMPL_DIR_RELATIVE = ".erk/impl-context" 29→"""Relative path for branch-scoped implementation directories.""" 30→
... [15 lines omitted] ...

340→ """Return plan_id from plan-ref.json. 341→ 342→ Plan-ref.json is the sole source of truth for plan-to-branch mapping. 343→ Branch names no longer encode issue numbers. 344→ 345→ Args: 346→ impl_dir: Path to .impl/ or .erk/impl-context/ directory 347→ branch_name: Current git branch name (unused, kept for interface compat) 348→ 349→ Returns: 350→ Plan ID (as string) from plan-ref.json, or None if not found. 351→ """ 352→ plan_ref = read_plan_ref(impl_dir) 353→ if plan_ref is not None: 354→ return plan_ref.plan_id 355→ 356→ return None 357→ 358→ 359→def read_run_info(impl_dir: Path) -> RunInfo | None: 360→ """Read GitHub Actions run info from .impl/run-info.json. 361→ 362→ Args: 363→ impl_dir: Path to .impl/ directory 364→ 365→ Returns: 366→ RunInfo if file exists and is valid, None otherwise 367→ """ 368→ run_info_file = impl_dir / "run-info.json" 369→
